ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source from which the dataset was imported */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical, time series) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the uploaded file (e.g., CSV, Excel, SQL dump) */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the uploaded file in bytes */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset, if applicable */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset for which statistics are computed */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the dataset */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the dataset */,
  "quantile_0_025" REAL /* 2.5th percentile value */,
  "quantile_0_05" REAL /* 5th percentile value */,
  "quantile_0_25" REAL /* 25th percentile value */,
  "median" REAL /* Median value */,
  "quantile_0_75" REAL /* 75th percentile value */,
  "quantile_0_95" REAL /* 95th percentile value */,
  "quantile_0_975" REAL /* 97.5th percentile value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistical computation */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical method used */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of data points in the sample */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the statistical metrics */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the statistical computation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES statistical_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical method used in the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES statistical_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "connection_string" TEXT /* Connection string for the data source */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last accessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the method (e.g., simple, medium, complex) */,
  "example_use_case" TEXT /* Example use case for the method */,
  "references" TEXT /* References or documentation for the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the metadata is associated with */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., system, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
